tooltip.starcatcher_delight.cactifish_st: A prickly Stew made from a cactifish.
Cactifish are not prickly, yet people expect a stew made from them to be,
so a cactus is usually added for the prickliness.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.magma_fish_b: A snack often prepared by adventurers ready to explore the nether.
Although an annoyance to prepare, the fact that they are so delicious makes it all worth it!
A gross-looking yet somehow tasty Stew made a sludge catfish.
A dish originating from the swamp villages cuisine,
often prepared with whatever there was available.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.blossom_toas: A tasty fish flavoured toast usually made with blossomfish.
A single bite of this toast is sure to lift your mood,
sharing a bit of cherry whim with everyone around you.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.steamed_reds: A steamed redscaled tuna that is sure to leave you craving for more.
The side of greens matches the flavour of the tuna perfectly,
making for a surprisingly flavourful dish.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.grilled_shro: A shroomfish grilled served with a side of greens and mashed potatoes.
It's said the recipe came from sailors stranded in a mushroom island,
with nothing but potatoes and lettuce to eat for months.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.spore_nigiri: A unique piece of nigiri made from a fresh (?) sporefish.
The disgusting aroma from the sporefish makes this a rather acquired taste.
Each bites reminds you of the gross ecosystem you're digesting.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.sweet_berry_: Taiyaki filled with a creamy paste of sweet berries.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.glow_berry_t: This traditional treat made from fresh Glow Berries is often used by adventurers before they dive below deepslate.
It's glowing properties allow for others to spot them from afar.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.chocolate_ta: Chocolate filled Taiyaki often given to well behaved kids.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.honey_taiyak: This type of Taiyaki is traditionally crafted by beekeepers,
and given as a gift when selling their honey to travelers.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.pumpkin_taiy: The most common type of Taiyaki.
It's sweet and moist, perfect for anyone looking for a treat.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.watermelon_t: Most common around Jungles, this type of taiyaki is filled with a melon paste giving it a very refreshing taste.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.starcaught_f: A raw fish fillet smelling as if it will go bad within the next 3 hours.
The main ingredient of fish cuisine.
Whatever dish it will eventually belong to, is sure to be of great quality.
A fish fillet of remarkable quality.
One can only hope to taste whatever incredible creation it's used on.
An incredibly precious fish fillet, obtained from a <sclegendary>legendary</sclegendary> fish.
A shame it had to end this way, but you can't help but wonder what delicious dish to prepare with it.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.hosomaki_com: An attempt at a piece of hosomaki. The rice is spilling everywhere
and the fish smells like it's gone bad. Yuck.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.hosomaki_unc: A piece of hosomaki, sliced from a roll.
You can only hope this piece got the worse part of
the fish and that's why the taste is so bland.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.hosomaki_rar: A tasty piece of hosomaki, made from fresh fish.
Sushi of this quality is often regarded as a slightly luxurious treat.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.hosomaki_epi: A perfect example on how to prepare quality sushi.
A single bite is sure to send you into a world of pleasure,
craving for more and more until the entire roll is gone.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.hosomaki_leg: An breathtaking example of fish cuisine other dishes can only dream of becoming.
This piece of Sushi is sure to make even the pickiest of eaters want more.
Unfortunately for them, there will be none left after you get a taste yourself.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.nigiri_commo: A gross piece of nigiri. It barely holds together.
The fish color makes the entire thing not appetizing in the slightest.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.nigiri_uncom: Although the fish doesn't appear to be of the best quality,
it will serve as a snack when needed.
A well prepared bit of nigiri, made from fresh fish topped on soft rice.
A real treat for your taste buds.
An incredibly good looking piece of nigiri.
Not only does the rice look extremely appetizing,
the attention to presentation is remarkable making is hard to resist a bite.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.nigiri_legen: Although the making of this type of sushi is not typically fancy,
this specific piece challenges everything you've known about sushi your entire life.
The delicate fish was carefully placed on top of rice cooked to perfection.
The aroma coming from it leaves your mouth watering begging for you to try it.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.temaki_commo: A disgusting piece of temaki. The rice tries its best to escape the cone shaped kelp,
but somehow its held back by the smell of the fillet. Gross.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.temaki_uncom: An attempt at temaki, clearly made by a notice chef.
Bad quality fish makes bad sushi. Nothing else to say.
A carefully assembled piece of temaki made with decent fish.
Each bite delivers a pleasant balance of texture and flavor,
making it a surprisingly enjoyable treat.
An exquisite piece of temaki, crafted with clear expertise.
The kelp is perfectly formed into a cone shape,
while the filling bursts with rich flavor that lingers long after the last bite.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.temaki_legen: Transcending the very idea of simple food,
every ingredient has been chosen with impossible precision,
harmonizing into a masterpiece that feels almost unreal.
One bite is enough to convince you that perfection truly exists.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.uramaki_comm: A poorly rolled piece of uramaki.
The rice is dry and uneven,
and the filling barely stays inside long enough to be eaten.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.uramaki_unco: A passable attempt at uramaki by an inexperienced hand.
The roll is serviceable, if a bit sloppy,
and while the flavors are muted, it gets the job done.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.uramaki_rare: A neatly rolled uramaki with a fresh fillet tucked inside.
The rice complements the fish really well,
resulting in a satisfying and well-rounded bite.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.uramaki_epic: A beautifully crafted piece of uramaki that showcases true skill.
Every grain of rice is perfectly seasoned,
enhancing the vibrant flavors hidden within the roll.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.uramaki_lege: This uramaki stands as a testament to culinary mastery.
Its flawless construction conceals layers of flavor that unfold with every bite,
each more profound than the last.
Eating it feels less like a meal and more like an experience meant to be remembered.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.fish_salad_u: A rushed fish salad, matching the quality of the fillet used.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.fish_salad_r: A nicely prepared fish salad. Satisfying both the eyes and the stomach.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.fish_salad_e: A incredibly well dressed salad. One must wonder where it got the clothes from.
Regardless, it's sure to keep you full for a while.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.fish_salad_l: The most appetizing fish salad you have ever had the pleasure lay your eyes upon.
Everything about it is perfect, from the portion size, to the presentation.
Looking at it you can't help but let your mouth water from wanting just a bite.
Best to hurry before it's all gone!
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.healthy_fish: Raw egg, undercooked fish, and vegetables that taste of paper.
There are no words to describe how hard it is to swallow this attempt at food.
Calling this healthy might be pushing it a bit,
but it serves as a decently sized meal to keep you full for a bit.
A tasty omelette prepared with bits of fish.
A unique combination but everything goes together surprisingly well.
A dish truly deserving of being called healthy, made from fresh fish and vegetables,
with eggs cooked to perfection before being served with a side of greens and tomato.
Evenly beaten egg fluids fried into half-doneness leave you wanting more before you even try some.
You can tell the fish used was of high quality as it perfectly matches your expectations.
The greens and tomato go perfectly with the omelette, making for a not only healthy, but also incredibly tasty dish.
tooltip.starcatcher_delight.fish_and_chi: §7A serving of fish and chips of <Unknown Quality>
A grotesque dish made by those who can't appreciate true fish cuisine.
An insult not only to the fish, but also to whoever will be forced to taste this.
A dish typical to the northern islands of the overworld,
where fish and potatoes are abundant. This one however, has gone soft.
Whoever is unfortunate enough to be forced to eat it should seek something better next time.
A fish fillet served with a side of golden and crispy chips.
A demonstration of what fish cuisine is capable of, even when using the simplest of ingredients.
The fish flavour compliments the chips saltiness perfectly for a combination made in heaven.
Coated fish fillets deep-fried to perfection.
Crispy chips are served along with it for a miraculous combination.
Will leave you scraping the plate as you eat the last chip.
